title: neocracca heterantha var. minor
intro: Neocracca heterantha var. minor, also known as Himalayan sweet shrub, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rosaceae. It is native to the Himalayas and is used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. Neocracca heterantha var. minor has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
